ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "neighbourhood_cleansed" TEXT /* Cleansed neighborhood name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "smart_location" TEXT /* Smart location description */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Apartment, Townhouse) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room available (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for renting the property */,
  "weekly_price" REAL /* Weekly rental price */,
  "monthly_price" REAL /* Monthly rental price */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit required for renting */,
  "cleaning_fee" REAL /* Cleaning fee for the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "amenity_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of amenity IDs for quick lookup */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is available for booking */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the property owner */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the property listing was updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the renter (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "property_owner_response" TEXT /* Response from the property owner to the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_flags" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation policy */,
  "cancellation_fee" REAL /* Fee for canceling the booking */,
  "guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the booking */,
  "confirmation_code" TEXT /* Unique confirmation code for the booking */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Check-in time for the property */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Check-out time for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., renter, property owner, agency staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location (features, attractions) */,
  "distance_to_city_center" REAL /* Distance to city center in kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "public_transport_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is public transport access */,
  "nearby_attractions" TEXT /* Description of nearby attractions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity offered (e.g., Wi-Fi, pool) */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., comfort, entertainment, safety) */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the amenity is a premium feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL path to the property image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior, garden) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
